sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4089" key="a)lhqorke/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀληθ-ορκέω</orth>, <sense id="n4089.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">swear truly</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:2:63" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.63</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
